parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "message": "chore: update intel digest " + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], "content": $('Build Digest JSON').first().json.content, "sha": $json.sha } }}

parameters.query: ={{ 'INSERT INTO research_digests (title, source_url, category, summary, risk_level) VALUES ' + $('Build Digest JSON').first().json.digest.items.map(i => `('${i.title.replace(/'/g, "''")}', '${i.source_url}', '${i.category}', '${i.summary.replace(/'/g, "''")}', '${i.risk_level}')`).join(', ') }}
